name: Chocolate-Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine date-bread mix and cocoa. Blend well.
3. Stir in milk and egg until thoroughly combined.
4. Pour batter into a greased 8 1/2 x 4 1/2-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake for 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool bread on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from pan and cool completely on the rack.
8. To make glaze, melt chocolate and butter over very low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
9. Remove from heat and stir in powdered sugar until stiff.
10. Stir in hot water (tablespoon) until glaze is smooth and of spreading consistency.
11. Smooth glaze over bread with walnut and pecan halves.
